title: colocasia rugosa
intro: Colocasia rugosa, also known as elephant ear, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Arum family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Colocasia rugosa can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine practices.
